name: ABC Autos Inc
description_short: BHPH used car dealership in Tampa/Wimauma, FL offering in-house auto financing for bad-credit buyers for 50+ years. Pre-qualify with no credit score impact.
description_long:
ABC Autos Inc. is a Buy Here Pay Here (BHPH) used car dealership with over 50 years of operating history in the Tampa Bay area. The company runs two physical locations — its primary lot at 6112 N Florida Ave., Tampa, FL 33604 and a second location in Wimauma, FL — serving Hillsborough County and surrounding communities. ABC Autos positions itself as both the vehicle seller and the lender, operating a fully in-house financing model rather than routing buyers through external banks or credit unions.

The dealership carries approximately 66 pre-owned vehicles at any given time across 17 makes, including Toyota, Honda, Hyundai, Nissan, Ford, Subaru, Kia, Chevrolet, and others. Inventory spans sedans, SUVs, pickup trucks, vans, and one luxury vehicle, with model years ranging from 2012 through 2021. Financing is handled entirely on-site at both locations. Buyers can start the process with an online pre-qualification that requires no hard credit pull, no Social Security Number, and no date of birth — a notably low-friction entry point.

The company's core differentiator is its second-chance financing model. Because ABC Autos acts as the bank, it can approve borrowers with bruised, damaged, or no credit who have been declined by conventional lenders. The dealership explicitly markets to this segment under terms like 'subprime auto financing,' 'bad credit auto loans,' and 'second chance financing.' Beyond the sale and loan, the company offers vehicle service scheduling, test drive booking, a trade-in and sell-your-car program, vehicle locating for specific models, and an online payment portal for existing customers. A refer-a-friend program is also listed.

ABC Autos fills a legitimate gap for sub-prime borrowers in the Tampa area who need reliable transportation and cannot access conventional financing. That said, BHPH dealerships universally charge higher interest rates than banks or credit unions — sometimes substantially so — and the ABC Autos website discloses no APR ranges, loan terms, or total financing costs, making comparison shopping impossible before an in-person visit. All vehicle prices are listed as 'Call For Price,' adding a second layer of opacity. Buyers should ask for the full APR, payment schedule, and total repayment amount before signing any contract. If ABC Autos reports on-time payments to the credit bureaus, the loan could aid credit rebuilding — but this should be confirmed explicitly, as not all BHPH dealers do so.
pros: 50+ years in business — one of the most established BHPH dealers in the Tampa Bay area
Two physical locations (Tampa and Wimauma) for added convenience across Hillsborough County
In-house financing means the dealer IS the bank — faster approvals without third-party lender gatekeeping
Pre-qualification requires no hard credit pull, no SSN, and no date of birth
Accepts buyers with bad, damaged, or bruised credit who have been turned down elsewhere
66-vehicle inventory spanning 17 makes and multiple body types (sedans, SUVs, trucks, vans)
Full-service dealership: service scheduling, test drives, trade-ins, vehicle locating, and online payments
cons: No APR, loan terms, or financing costs disclosed on the website — total cost of borrowing is unknown until in-person
All vehicle prices listed as 'Call For Price' — no price transparency online
BHPH financing typically carries significantly higher interest rates than traditional auto lenders
Only serves the Tampa/Wimauma, FL area — no remote or online-only financing option
No confirmation on the website that loan payments are reported to credit bureaus for credit-building purposes
best_for: Tampa-area consumers with bad or damaged credit who have been declined by traditional banks or credit unions
Buyers needing a vehicle quickly who want a single location for both purchase and financing approval
Consumers who want to pre-qualify without a hard credit pull before committing to a dealership visit
Subprime borrowers seeking a second-chance auto loan from a long-established local lender
diagnosis: ABC Autos Inc. is best for Tampa-area consumers with bad or no credit who need a vehicle and have been turned down by conventional lenders — the BHPH model removes the bank as a gatekeeper and the no-hard-pull pre-qualification lowers the barrier to entry. The main caveat is cost opacity: APR ranges and loan terms are not disclosed online, and BHPH financing consistently carries higher rates than traditional auto loans, so buyers must negotiate in-person and scrutinize the full contract before signing.
services: Buy Here Pay Here (BHPH) in-house auto financing
Pre-qualification with no credit score impact, no SSN or DoB required
Bad credit and subprime auto loans
Second chance auto financing for previously declined buyers
Used car, truck, SUV, and van sales (66 vehicles, 17 makes)
Vehicle locating service for specific models
Online payment portal for existing loan customers
In-person financing approval at two Florida locations
